BAGL
Sensory neuron (O2, CO2, social signals, touch)
Conns in: AQR: 7, AFDR: 2, BAGR: 2, ASEL: 1

BAGR
Sensory neuron (O2, CO2, social signals, touch)
Conns in: AQR: 12, ADFL: 1, AFDL: 1, ASEL: 1, ASER: 1, ASIL: 1,
IL2VL: 1
Conns out: BAGL: 2, URXL: 2, AFDL: 1

URXL
Sensory neuron (O2, CO2, social signals, touch)

ADFR: 1, CEPVL: 1, IL2L: 1, OLLL: 1
Conns out: IL2L: 2, AQR: 1, CEPVL: 1, DVA: 1

URXR
Sensory neuron (O2, CO2, social signals, touch)
Conns in: CEPDR: 4, CEPVR: 4, ADFR: 2, IL2R: 2, IL2VR: 2,
DVA: 1
Conns out: IL2R: 6, AQR: 1, IL1R: 1
